descriptionShort: Profile of Richmond Sockeyes coach Orland Kurtenbach juggling insurance business, driving range development, and junior hockey coaching.
descriptionLong: Orland Kurtenbach, former first member of the NHL Canucks in 1970, is profiled as he balances three ventures: building a general insurance business in New Westminster, developing a golf driving range in Surrey, and coaching the Richmond Sockeyes junior hockey team. Owner Bruce Taylor recruited him in July 1986. Now 50 years old, Kurtenbach works 8 a.m. to midnight most days.

attribution.headline: STEVE ORLAND KURTENBACH: putting in 16-hour days
